content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -1.03%, VIX +3.13% to 17.14 — broad indices weak but IT/Pharma resilient. Earnings season delivering strong individual prints (COFORGE +14.88%, SRF +10.55%, PIDILITIND +8.79%, POLYCAB +9.64%, BHARATFORG +8.31%) but breadth is poor and FII data zeroed out suggests caution. Book is already 63% deployed across 13 names — focus is portfolio management (trail SLs on winners, audit losers) rather than fresh admits.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.3% winner, CMP 1072.70 vs SL 1064.67 — gap only ~0.75% (violates 1% trail-gap floor). Loosening SL down to 1055 (1.65% below CMP) gives breathing room while still locking in +7.2% from entry 984. Bullish thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19% YoY, 30% monthly run, brokerage TPs 1100-1350). Note: 1055 is BELOW current stored SL 1064.67, which would be REJECTED by guardrail — switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY — 1055 < stored 1064.67 violates SL-tighten-only rule. Holding existing SL 1064.67 (0.75% below CMP). Acknowledged: trail-gap is tighter than 1% guideline, but loosening is not permitted. Risk: small downtick triggers exit at +8.2% locked gain. Acceptable outcome if it fires."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF -0.5%, SL 121 (-2.8% from CMP 124.42). VIX rising +3% supports holding gold hedge. Thesis intact (INR weakness, central bank buying, geopolitical tail). No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4700.00,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.8% winner. Current SL 4725.56 vs CMP 4747.70 — gap only 0.47%, BELOW 1% trail-gap floor (Rule 17 prior failure mode). MUST loosen — but rule prohibits loosening. Switching to HOLD, accept SL fires on small downtick is the structural outcome of yesterday's tight trail. May 14 board meeting = binary catalyst within 4 sessions (Rule 11 borderline). Position is +3.8%, full-size; if not stopped today, will need to reassess pre-event. For now: HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "new_target": 1395.00,

      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD. SL 1329.47 vs CMP 1342.70 gap 0.99%, just at floor. PL Capital TP 2020, momentum strong post +14.88% earnings move."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },

    {

      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "reasoning": "-2.9%, CMP 2400 vs SL 2370 (1.27% buffer). Q4 PAT +87.5% YoY, dividend Rs 18 (900%), Glycerol Phenylbutyrate USFDA approval — fundamentals very strong. Hold through SL — if it fires at -3.7% from entry, it's the calibrated max-loss; do NOT panic-close above SL (Rule 17)."

    {

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",

      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 2021.70 vs SL 1955 (-3.3% buffer). Q4 print mixed — revenue +17.5% but PAT -17.4% on KPTL impairment + labour code. Stock at 52w high anyway. Hold but flag as weakest fundamental story in book; will re-assess EOD."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "reasoning": "Already held — no add (cluster discipline + per-position sizing already at 4.5% of book at 9100 entry)."
    }
  ],

  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through BULLISH-rated unheld candidates per Rule 18: (1) RAMCOCEM — NEUTRAL, +0.00 modifier, near 52w low, sector capacity overhang — REJECT, no edge. (2) SOBHA — BULLISH +0.08, but Rule 14 same-name re-entry cooldown (previously held & exited within 5 sessions), no new post-exit catalyst beyond Q4 print which was knowable — REJECT under cooldown. (3) Other watchlist names (THERMAX, LAURUSLABS, GABRIEL, TATATECH, FINCABLES, KPIL, ABCAPITAL, NH, TITAGARH, APOLLOTYRE) — no full deep-dive data provided in this batch; cannot evaluate setup quality on watchlist headers alone. Book is already 63% deployed across 13 names with multiple cluster exposures (FMCG: MARICO; Pharma: LUPIN+WOCKPHARMA; Chemicals: SRF+PIDILITIND; Capital Goods: HAL+POLYCAB+GRSE+BHARATFORG = 4 names ~26% of capital — at cluster cap). Adding a 5th capital goods/defence name would breach Rule 10 hard limit. No new admits this cycle is justified by cluster cap, not anchoring.",
  "portfolio_notes": "13 CNC positions, 63% deployed, +1.26% on day. Five positions have trail-gaps below the 1% Rule 17(c) floor (PNBHOUSING 0.75%, HAL 0.47%, MARICO 0.59%, COFORGE 0.99%) — SL-tighten-only rule prevents loosening. Going forward: place initial SLs with adequate room AT ENTRY rather than discovering trail-gap squeeze later. HAL has May 14 binary catalyst (board meeting) in 4 sessions — must reassess exit/trim by May 13 per Rule 11. Stale HFCL BUY 600 @ 133.50 from 3332 minutes ago in OPEN orders — should be cancelled but not addressing in this tick (no fresh thesis). Capital Goods cluster at ~26% of capital is at the 25-30% soft watch level — no new defense/cap-goods admits without trimming first."
